title: fix: mark Z-Image provider as Vast
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
- Changes Z-Image's registry provider from `runpod` to `vast`
- Aligns model metadata with the production backend migrated in #12589
- Leaves pricing and routing behavior unchanged

Checks:
- `npx biome check --write shared/registry/image.ts`
- Registry import resolves `IMAGE_SERVICES.zimage.provider` as `vast`
- `git diff --check`

gist.headline: Z-Image Finds Its Nest
gist.blurb: Z-Image’s registry badge now points to Vast, where its production backend already lives. Same pixels, tidier map.
gist.summary: Updated `IMAGE_SERVICES.zimage.provider` in the image registry from `runpod` to `vast`, aligning Z-Image metadata with the production backend migrated in #12589 without changing pricing or routing.
gist.impact: Developers inspecting Z-Image registry metadata now see Vast as the correct provider while generation behavior, routes, and prices remain the same.
gist.visual_concept: Depict a cozy garden signpost being corrected so a Z-Image flower pot points toward a small Vast cloud-server greenhouse; Polly carefully replaces the old provider label while a nearby terminal confirms the route is unchanged. Use the provider correction as a map-making metaphor, with code-plants and warm infrastructure imagery.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly, a cute pixel art bee mascot with a yellow body and dark brown horizontal stripes, small black legs, two black antennae, black vertical oval eyes, bright pink rectangular blush marks on cheeks, a small happy smile, and small rounded light blue translucent wings, wearing a tiny gardener tool belt as she fixes a garden sign from “runpod” to “vast” beside a Z-Image code-flower pot and a softly glowing retro terminal. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic, soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background, warm lighting, code-plants and flowers, subtle pixel-font text “VAST”, retro gaming vibes like Stardew Valley or A Short Hike, nostalgic but beautiful.

Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic, soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background, warm lighting, code-plants and flowers, subtle pixel-font text “VAST”, retro gaming vibes like Stardew Valley or A Short Hike, nostalgic but beautiful.
